svg.title: Bulkhead Pattern with Circuit Breaker Integration
svg.desc: Defense in depth architecture showing how bulkhead isolation combined with circuit breaker state transitions provides comprehensive fault tolerance
svg.text: Bulkhead Pattern + Circuit Breaker: Defense in Depth
Resource isolation with pool exhaustion detection and automatic circuit breaker state transitions
Routes requests to appropriate pool based on service/tenant
Circuit Breaker State Machine with Pool Exhaustion Detection
Defense in Depth: Bulkhead + Circuit Breaker
